mapper.sql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS lineNo , SEMINAR_HSTY_ID AS seminarHstyId , SMNR_ID AS seminarId , STD_ID AS stdNo , ATND_SDTTM AS atndDttm , CNTN_DVC_TYCD AS deviceTypeCd , USER_ID AS userId , RGTR_IP AS regIp , RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm FROM TB_LMS_SEMINAR_HSTY WHERE 1 = 1
